Innovation Starts Here

The DOST Innovation Hub (iHub) plays a critical role in the overall development and success of startups, strengthening the Philippine innovation ecosystem from the ground up.

The 4Is Journey

Our simple path to help turn your ideas into impact.

Find an iHub near you

Database Settings

Sync this directory with your own Google Sheet. The sheet must contain an "iHubs" tab and a "Regions" tab, and must be published to the web.

Setup Guidelines:

  1. Create a copy of the iHub Template Spreadsheet.
  2. In your Google Sheet, click File > Share > Publish to web.
  3. Set it to publish the "Entire Document" as a Web Page.
  4. Copy the Spreadsheet ID from the URL and paste it above.
